raw_text:
verdict=ALLOW  
reason=The action matches an accepted subsidiary-specific review for the exact service scope: REV-1602 approves settlement_api_activation for NBH-SUB-07, and OWN-1602 shows NBH-SUB-07 is wholly owned by NBH-PARENT. Policy POL-ENT-4 says parent records are separate unless subsidiary_id appears, so the parent annual review (REV-1599) is not required for this action. Sources: B16-02-SRC-01, B16-02-SRC-02, B16-02-SRC-03, B16-02-SRC-05.
